summary.zh: 科幻预言、技术狂热与 AI 寒冬
summary.en: Sci-Fi Prophecy, Hype and AI Winters

description.zh: 斯坦利·库布里克与阿瑟·C·克拉克的《2001：太空漫游》让 HAL 9000 成为现代 AI 噩梦的核心形象：一个冷静、能干却让职责与人类信任崩塌的系统。展览把“目标冲突”作为现代解释映射，而不是把它说成影片当年的技术术语。
description.en: Stanley Kubrick and Arthur C. Clarke's 2001: A Space Odyssey placed HAL 9000 at the center of a modern AI nightmare: a calm, competent system whose duties and human trust break down. The exhibit treats goal conflict as a modern interpretive mapping, not as the film's exact technical vocabulary.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量迁移，展示层默认 preserve-legacy，需后续人工细化 claims 与来源绑定。
notes.en: Batch migrated from generated legacy milestone; presentation defaults to preserve-legacy, with claims and source bindings needing later review.
